'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=yE_wI1haoqH5GlDT3eamwKmaJwVz59W6myx._nZKq.w-1776057151-1.0.1.1-FlU7ZIysJh3z12HMrTOoDv9o33R6IEVy7J5yVxrk4XI"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
